message:
test(cli): wrap two clap-parser tests in run_on_large_stack

parse_index_semantic_embedder_flags and parse_index_embedder_default
were using the default 2 MiB test-thread stack. The rest of the cli
parser test module already runs on the expanded run_on_large_stack
harness because Cli::try_parse_from deeply recurses through clap's
generated match arms (about 4KB per subcommand frame × ~80-100
subcommands). These two tests escaped the wrap during an earlier
refactor and occasionally stack-overflowed under debug builds with
instrumentation on.

Pure mechanical wrap of the existing assertion bodies — no logic
changed, just parked inside a closure that executes on the larger
stack.
